description: A setup guide for a side-by-side experiment: MCP server vs CLI tool for grounding an AI in the Cassini mission dataset. Opinionated setup, neutral conclusions — the reader draws their own.

tasks.title: Write README.md
tasks.description: Write README.md at the project root framing the MCP vs CLI experiment. Cover: what the repo contains, what cassini.db is and why it makes a good test subject, setup instructions for both implementations, 3-5 example questions drawn from actual data (e.g. Enceladus flybys, moon summaries), and a 'how to compare' section. Brief agentloop mention. No declared winner. Link out for MCP internals.
acceptanceCriteria: Includes MCP vs CLI experiment framing as the hook
Explains cassini.db dataset (master_plan and planets tables, key fields)
Setup instructions for both MCP and CLI implementations
3-5 example questions using actual data from the database
